nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 1903; const int b = 2115; const int c = 2174; const int d = 2219; const int e = 2256; const int f = 2290; const int g = 2323; const int h = 2354; const int i = 2387; const int j = 2421; const int k = 2458; const int l = 2503; const int m = 2562; const int n = 2774;
